title: Edge Security Ground Truth: Reproducible CISA KEV Counts for Edge Appliance Vendors
description: Uniform, reproducible, cited exploitation data for perimeter and edge security vendors (firewalls, SSL-VPN gateways, and remote-access appliances). 115 CISA KEV-listed exploited CVEs across 13 vendors (2020-2026), counted from the live CISA KEV feed under one transparent scope rule and enriched with EPSS scores, NVD CVSS/CWE, time-to-exploit, threat-actor attribution, and MITRE ATT&CK technique mappings. Ships reproducible standard-library-only Python analysis (Kaplan-Meier survival of time-to-exploitation, market-share-normalized rate ratios and a Poisson regression of count on installed base, exact significance testing) plus machine-readable CSV/JSON and Croissant metadata. This is data, not a ranking: it publishes a reproducible count and individually sourced facts, with named confounds, rather than a vendor score.
